name: list_directory
description:
List files and subdirectories at a given path.

Returns structured output with file/directory indicators and sizes.
Optionally recursive with configurable depth limit.

**Response format:**
```json
{"path": "src/", "entries": [{"name": "main.py", "type": "file", "size": 1234}, {"name": "utils/", "type": "dir"}]}
```

path.description: Directory path relative to project root (default: '.')

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth (default: 3, only used with recursive=true)
